At 10 o'clock Monday morning
the legal storm which has conferred
about Elizabeth Gurley Flynn
Jones and c. l.. Filigno, |. w. w.
leaders. for the past few days, win
begin with undated fury, after a
two days cessation of hostilities.
with both the defense and prosecu-
ton focusing their attention and
directing their oratory toward the
- who will decide whether the de-
PENDANTS will be given their free
dom or sent to the county Jail to
serve a sentence for conspiring to
break the street-speaking ordinance
of Spokane


Yesterday afternoon Prosecutor
Pugh introduced some rebuttal evil
dence relative to the sweatbox tes-
timony of the defense; then fol
lowed the instructions to the jury,
after which the jurors were dis
missed until Monday morning.
while the attorneys sought rest
from the arduous labors of the past
few days preparatory to the plead
ing with the jury for or against
the freedom of the |. w. w. leaders
who were fighting for the cause of
free speech.
